name: Free My Sight
short_description: FREE MY SIGHT is eight easy exercises which helps You perform eyes movements and stretching mixing gentle music to relax Your mind and release Your stress: sometimes Your eyes deserve it: relax Your mind and stretch Your eyes
detailed_description: follow object, read letters from far to near, converge Your eyes, and other simple exercises to stretch the muscle of Your eyes combined with minimal user interface and relaxing music to reset Your mind: FREE MY SIGHT is eight easy exercises which helps You perform eyes movements and stretching mixing gentle music to relax Your mind and release Your stress: sometimes Your eyes deserve it: relax Your mind and stretch Your eyes
